value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Audit baseline (full repo): prioritized findings are silent settings fallback on invalid JSON, lock read/parse failures collapsing to stale behavior without diagnostics, unreadable item skips without visibility, and docs/package metadata drift (calendar versioning wording + repository links + packaged community docs). Chosen implementation policy is warn-continue to preserve compatibility while improving diagnosability.

patch.value:
Execute full-repo issue sweep and implement top-priority warning-first runtime plus docs and package metadata fixes.

Implementation scope: (1) runtime warning surfaces in settings/lock/item-store paths, (2) tests covering warning behavior and regression semantics, (3) changelog/package metadata alignment, (4) full verification and closure evidence.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Apply warning-first changes with deterministic warning tokens and preserve existing return types where possible to minimize blast radius.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Implemented runtime warning-first hardening slice 1: settings reads now emit deterministic warning tokens on invalid JSON/schema fallbacks; lock stale conflicts include deterministic warning tokens when lock metadata is unreadable/invalid; item-store listing paths now collect deterministic warning tokens for unreadable item files and non-ENOENT directory read failures.
